name: Brigitte Sealing's Sausage Pasta Supper
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Turkey sausage, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a baking dish.
2. Saute onions and peppers with mushrooms.
3. Add vegetables and sausage to the dish.
4. Cook until heated through and seasoned as desired.
5. Stir in Parmesan cheese.
6. Serve over noodles, topping with additional Parmesan cheese.
